name: Buttermilk Surprise
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and buttermilk until smooth.
2. Add the Cool Whip and mix well.
3. Layer the sliced bananas on top of the mixture in the baking dish.
4. Sprinkle the chopped pecans evenly over the bananas.
5. Cover the dish with plastic wrap or foil.
6. Place the dish in the freezer and allow it to freeze until firm, about 4-6 hours.
Charlotte Stockton
